comment: Cloudflare Access application template for EasyFire Bookkeeping. Apply manually in Cloudflare Zero Trust dashboard or via API.
name: EasyFire Bookkeeping

include.comment: Restrict to a single admin user. Use email-based OTP authentication.

note: Restrict Access to ONE user. Expose only via Cloudflare Tunnel (no public ports). Envoy binds 127.0.0.1 only.
